ui.welcome: Jorinova activated. How can I help you?
ui.welcome_slow: Jorinova … is … activated. … How can I help you?
ui.not_understood: I did not understand that. Could you please repeat?
ui.confirm_critical: This is a critical medical action. Are you sure you want to proceed? Say yes to confirm or no to cancel.
ui.confirm_dangerous: Warning. This action could have serious consequences. Please think carefully before proceeding. Say yes to confirm.
ui.escalating: I am escalating this request to the Head of Department for authorization. They will be notified now.
ui.escalated: Request sent to Head of Department. Please wait for their decision before proceeding.
ui.escalation_blocked: This action has been blocked. The Head of Department has been notified.
ui.persist_warning: You are insisting on this action. I must now inform your department head.
ui.offline_mode: System is running in offline mode. Basic functions are available.
ui.repeat_prompt: Would you like me to repeat that?
ui.error: An error occurred. Please try again or contact your supervisor.
ui.goodbye: Jorinova deactivated. Have a good session.
ui.unauthorized: You do not have permission to perform this action.
ui.serial_prompt: Please state your Nexus serial code.
ui.serial_verified: Identity verified. You may now speak your command.
ui.serial_failed: Serial code not recognised. Access denied.
ui.slow_mode_on: Slow speech mode is now active. I will speak more slowly.
ui.accessibility_on: Accessibility mode is now active. I will speak very slowly with pauses.
